data.title: BitMart contracts will be listed on SOPHUSDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart Contract will launch SOPHUSDT perpetual contract at 15:00 (UTC+8) on May 30, 2025.

data.title: Thailand’s SEC blocks and sues multiple crypto exchanges for unlicensed operations
data.description:
The Thailand SEC is set to block crypto exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX, and XT on June 28 and file lawsuits against them for offering unlicensed crypto services.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/thailands-sec-blocks-and-sues-exchanges/

data.title: Decentralized AI favored by majority of Americans: DCG poll
data.description:
A Harris poll commissioned by Digital Currency Group found 77% of surveyed Americans saw decentralized AI “as more beneficial to society overall. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/decentralized-ai-favored-majority-americans-dcg-harris-poll?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: DCG poll shows that 77% of American respondents support decentralized AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the poll results commissioned by DCG and conducted by Harris, 77% of American respondents believe that decentralized AI is "more beneficial to society", of which 56% are more inclined to support this model. Most people are worried that centralized AI has stronger bias, high risk of data abuse and is more beneficial to large companies. DCG's vice president of policy said that the transformative power of AI should not be monopolized by a few technology giants. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs have first joint outflow in 2 weeks, but BlackRock bucks trend
data.description:
US Bitcoin ETFs ended a 10-trading-day inflow streak with a $347 million net outflow on May 29, with BlackRock’s fund the only product to see a net inflow.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-etfs-first-outflow-2-weeks-blackrock-bucks-trend?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description:
He suggested that a move from Meta would mark a turning point for institutional confidence in crypto as a treasury […] The post Meta Could Lead U. S.
source: https://coindoo.com/meta-could-lead-u-s-giants-into-bitcoin-treasury-adoption/

data.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs see $358 million in net outflows, ending 10-day inflow streak
data.description:
Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $358. 65 million in net outflows on Thursday, marking the largest daily exit for the ETFs since March 11.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356336/us-spot-bitcoin-etfs-see-358-million-in-net-outflows-ending-10-day-inflow-streak?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: OKX will adjust the settlement frequency of LPTUSDT perpetual contract funding
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will adjust the funding settlement frequency of LPTUSDT perpetual contracts from May 30, 2025, from once every 4 hours to once every 2 hours, in order to better prevent market risks and further optimize the user trading experience.

data.title: Asian stocks dip as tariff trouble cause major sell off
data.description:
Asian markets fell on Friday due to investor fears after an appeals court restored Trump’s tariffs, ending an earlier ban. Beijing’s markets fell hardest after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said talks with China had stalled recently, hurting hopes for a lasting tariff deal. Bloomberg reported that Shanghai’s Composite Index and the CSI 300 both slipped […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/asian-stocks-dip-tariff-trouble/

data.title: Binance helps dismantle global child exploitation network in historic operation stream
data.description:
30-5-2025 – Binance has emerged as a pivotal force in the global takedown of Kidflix, a heinous digital platform that preyed on the vulnerable. Dubbed “Operation Stream,” this sweeping international effort, orchestrated by German and Dutch authorities under Europol’s coordination, culminated in the platform’s demise on 11 March 2025, shattering a network that boasted nearly [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/binance-helps-dismantle-global-child-exploitation-network-in-historic-operation-stream/

data.title: Thailand SEC to Shut Down Five Crypto Exchanges
data.description:
Thai SEC mandates closure of Bybit, CoinEx, OKX by June 2025 due to unlicensed operations.
source: https://coincu.com/340626-thailand-sec-closes-crypto-exchanges

data.title: Central African Republic to Tokenize Land Using National Solana Meme Coin
data.description:
Central African Republic will tokenize over 1,700 hectares of land using its national meme coin $CAR, President Touadéra said Thursday.
source: https://decrypt.co/322974/central-african-republic-tokenize-land-solana-meme-coin

data.title: Bitcoin Bull James Wynn Close to Total Liquidation as Losses Near $100M
data.description:
James Wynn, the Hyperliquid trader who had at one time a billion-dollar notional position, has become an outsized victim of bitcoin's BTC cooling sentiment.Wynn's current highly leveraged BTC position, which he appears to be struggling to maintain, spiralled into a loss of nearly $100 million over the last week.Data from Hyperdash shows that Wynn's margin usage is nearing 100%, which would result in a total liquidation of his position, though Wynn recently made a deposit of $376,000 to bolster his defenses.The trader, known for making aggressive bets under the pseudonym "moonpig," currently holds a long position of approximately 1,690 BTC, valued at roughly $178
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/30/bitcoin-bull-james-wynn-close-to-total-liquidation-as-losses-near-100m

data.title: Thailand SEC to block Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT platforms in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Thai SEC announced that it will block cryptocurrency exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT platforms on June 28, 2025, and file legal proceedings against them, accusing them of committing acts classified as unlicensed digital asset business operators.

data.title: FLOCK rose above 0.14 USDT, an increase of more than 60%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market shows that FLOCK has risen above 0.14 USDT, an increase of more than 60%, and is currently quoted at 0.131 USDT.

data.title: Football Team Paris Saint-Germain Scores Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
European football club Paris Saint-Germain has adopted a “new generation trend,” adding Bitcoin to its treasury.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/football-team-paris-saint-germain-scores-bitcoin-treasury-strategy/

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launches RDO and miffy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched BNB Smart Chain and Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens RDO, miffy.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Synthetix restores sUSD anchor to $1, will increase 420 pool collateral requirements
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Synthetix announced that its stablecoin sUSD will be restored to the $1 target, and will require SNX debt mortgagees to increase the sUSD mortgage ratio in the 420 pool from 10% to 20% from 23:59 UTC on June 2, otherwise the debt exemption will be suspended. Previously, due to user selling, sUSD once fell to $0.70. The official said that restoring the anchor will help promote the SIP-420 proposal and the subsequent deployment of the v4 contract on the Ethereum mainnet.

data.title: US Blacklists Philippines Internet Infrastructure Provider Tied to $200M Crypto Scam
data.description:
The US has sanctioned a Philippines-based internet infrastrucutre firm and its administrator for aiding $200m in crypto scam losses through pig butchering schemes.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/us-sanctions-funnull-tech-for-200m-crypto-scam/

data.title: Ross Ulbricht highlights ‘freedom, decentralization, unity’ in first speech after release
data.description:
Ulbricht was sentenced to double life imprisonment without parole for operating Silk Road, and was pardoned by President Trump this year.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356331/ross-ulbricht-first-speech-after-release?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
